name: gpt-researcher
args: tmp=$(mktemp -d) && git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/assafelovic/gptr-mcp.git "$tmp" >/dev/null && cd "$tmp" && MCP_TRANSPORT=stdio uv run --with-requirements requirements.txt server.py

name: graphiti
args: tmp=$(mktemp -d) && git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/getzep/graphiti.git "$tmp" >/dev/null && cd "$tmp/mcp_server" && uv run --isolated --project . main.py --transport stdio

name: fastmcp-demo
blender-mcp
notes: Community Blender MCP server. It requires the paired Blender addon or bridge to be installed in Blender, while BLENDER_HOST and BLENDER_PORT point the local MCP process at that bridge.

name: cognee
args: tmp=$(mktemp -d) && git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/topoteretes/cognee.git "$tmp" >/dev/null && cd "$tmp/cognee-mcp" && uv sync --dev --all-extras --reinstall && uv run python src/server.py

name: docker-mcp
args: tmp=$(mktemp -d) && git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/docker/hub-mcp.git "$tmp" >/dev/null && cd "$tmp" && npm install >/dev/null && npm run build >/dev/null && node dist/index.js --transport=stdio

name: discord-mcp
notes: Community-maintained Discord MCP server with broad guild/channel/message tooling. Requires a Discord bot token with the needed bot permissions and intents.

name: gmail
notes: Community-maintained Gmail MCP server with browser OAuth auto-auth. If env is omitted it falls back to ~/.gmail-mcp/gcp-oauth.keys.json and ~/.gmail-mcp/credentials.json.

name: google-drive
notes: Feature-rich Google Drive/Docs/Sheets/Slides/Calendar MCP server. Standard local setup uses OAuth credentials plus token storage; the project also supports service-account and external-token auth modes.

name: notion-mcp-server
notes: Official local Notion MCP server for the Notion API. Notion now prioritizes its remote MCP offering, but this local package remains the official npm server.

name: airtable-mcp-server
notes: Community-maintained Airtable MCP server. Requires an Airtable personal access token with schema and record scopes for the target bases.

name: hubspot-mcp-server
notes: Official HubSpot beta MCP server. Requires a HubSpot private app access token with the scopes needed by the CRM tools you want to expose.

name: salesforce-mcp
notes: Official Salesforce DX MCP server. It does not require API-key env vars by default, but it does require you to have already authorized the target Salesforce org locally with the Salesforce CLI.

name: stripe-mcp
notes: Official Stripe MCP server. A restricted API key is recommended so the enabled tools match the permissions you actually want to grant.

name: shopify-mcp
notes: Community-maintained Shopify Admin API MCP server with broad store-management coverage. Uses Shopify client_credentials auth rather than an interactive browser flow.

name: paypal-mcp
notes: Official PayPal MCP server. Requires a PayPal access token; set PAYPAL_ENVIRONMENT to SANDBOX or PRODUCTION depending on the token source.

name: algolia-mcp
args: tmp=$(mktemp -d) && git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/algolia/mcp.git "$tmp" >/dev/null && cd "$tmp/cmd/mcp" && go run .
notes: Official but experimental Algolia MCP server from Algolia's Go repository. Requires Go locally and at least read credentials; write operations additionally require ALGOLIA_WRITE_API_KEY.

name: elasticsearch-mcp
notes: Community-maintained Elasticsearch MCP server with broad API coverage and version detection across ES 5.x-9.x. Use either ES_API_KEY or ES_USERNAME/ES_PASSWORD.

name: jina-mcp-tools
notes: Community MCP wrapper around Jina AI Reader and Search APIs. JINA_API_KEY is optional for reader-only usage, but search features expect it.

name: weaviate-docs-mcp
notes: Official Weaviate documentation MCP endpoint proxied through mcp-remote for stdio-compatible clients. This entry targets the public docs server rather than a self-hosted Weaviate data plane.

name: pinecone-mcp
notes: Official Pinecone Developer MCP server. Without PINECONE_API_KEY it can still search docs, but index management and record operations require the API key.

name: qdrant-mcp
notes: Community-maintained but feature-complete Qdrant MCP server. Use QDRANT_URL for a remote cluster or QDRANT_LOCAL_PATH for embedded local storage; semantic search and write tools need embedding configuration.

name: milvus-mcp
notes: Community-maintained Milvus MCP server, based on the earlier Zilliz implementation and packaged for uvx. You can keep the URI in args or rely on MILVUS_URI from env.

name: neo4j-mcp
args: tmp=$(mktemp -d) && git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/neo4j/mcp.git "$tmp" >/dev/null && cd "$tmp" && go run ./cmd/neo4j-mcp
notes: Official Neo4j MCP server. STDIO mode validates connectivity and APOC availability at startup, so the target Neo4j instance must already be reachable and have APOC installed.

name: arangodb-mcp
notes: Official ArangoDB MCP server is currently distributed as a Docker image. For HTTPS deployments, set ARANGO_VERIFY_SSL=true and mount the CA file path into the container for ARANGO_SSL_CERT_PATH.

name: clickhouse-mcp
notes: Official ClickHouse MCP server from ClickHouse. Defaulting write and drop access to false matches the safer read-only posture described in the README.

name: kafka-mcp-server
args: tmp=$(mktemp -d) && git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/tuannvm/kafka-mcp-server.git "$tmp" >/dev/null && cd "$tmp" && go run ./cmd
notes: Community Kafka MCP server implemented in Go with stdio and HTTP transports. The documented startup path is a built binary, so this entry uses a temporary source clone plus go run for one-shot execution.

name: rabbitmq-mcp
notes: RabbitMQ MCP server re-homed under amazon-mq and published on PyPI. Broker connection details are supplied during tool usage rather than through mandatory startup env vars.

name: temporal-mcp
notes: Community Temporal MCP server with a strong read-only operational focus. Set TEMPORAL_API_KEY only for Temporal Cloud profiles; self-hosted clusters can be configured entirely through the JSON config file.

name: airflow-mcp-server
notes: Community Airflow 3 MCP server. Authentication is primarily passed via CLI args, and Airflow 3 only supports JWT auth in this server; AIRFLOW_MCP_RESOURCES_DIR is optional for local Markdown resources.

name: prefect-mcp
notes: Official Prefect MCP server. It can inherit credentials from a local Prefect profile, but explicit PREFECT_API_URL and PREFECT_API_KEY are the most portable batch configuration.

name: dagster-mcp
notes: Community Dagster MCP server focused on Dagster GraphQL operations. The upstream README documents localhost:3000/graphql as the default connection target, so this env key is included as the practical override point.

name: metabase-mcp
notes: Community Metabase MCP server with broad Metabase OSS API coverage and clearly documented token-based auth. Requires a Metabase API token rather than an email/password login flow.

name: superset-mcp
notes: Community Apache Superset MCP server. Use either username/password or SUPERSET_ACCESS_TOKEN; token auth is the cleaner option when your Superset deployment supports it.

name: tableau-mcp
notes: Official Tableau MCP server. PAT auth is the documented standard config for local MCP clients, so the batch entry uses SERVER, SITE_NAME, PAT_NAME, and PAT_VALUE.

name: powerbi-mcp
notes: Community Power BI MCP server. Local PBIX analysis works with only POWERBI_PBIX_ROOT; Azure credentials are additionally required for cloud workspace, dataset, and export operations.

name: minimax-mcp-js
notes: Official MiniMax MCP JavaScript implementation. The API host must match the region of the API key, and MINIMAX_RESOURCE_MODE controls whether generated assets are returned as URLs or downloaded locally.

name: openai-mcp-server
notes: Community OpenAI MCP wrapper. I did not find an official standalone OpenAI stdio MCP package for this slot, so this entry uses the simplest maintained community server and passes the API key through an env-expanded wrapper.

name: claude-code-mcp
notes: Official Anthropic option for exposing Claude Code capabilities as an MCP server. Anthropic does not publish a separate generic 'Anthropic tools' server package here, so this uses the built-in `claude mcp serve` command.

name: gemini-mcp
notes: Community Gemini MCP server with multimodal analysis plus Imagen and Veo generation support. Google's official Gemini CLI documents MCP client support, but not a dedicated Gemini stdio server package for this slot.

name: huggingface-mcp
notes: Official Hugging Face MCP server proxied through mcp-remote for stdio-compatible clients. The hosted endpoint prefers an Authorization bearer token; HF_TOKEN is the practical credential to supply when your client cannot complete the interactive login flow.

name: replicate-mcp
notes: Official Replicate MCP server. Replicate's docs standardize authentication around REPLICATE_API_TOKEN, so this batch entry keeps only that required credential.

name: stability-ai-mcp
notes: Community Stability AI MCP server. The README documents STABILITY_AI_API_KEY as the minimal required configuration for Stability's hosted image APIs.

name: elevenlabs-mcp
notes: Official ElevenLabs MCP server. ELEVENLABS_MCP_BASE_PATH controls local file output, ELEVENLABS_MCP_OUTPUT_MODE controls URL vs local-path style responses, and ELEVENLABS_API_RESIDENCY is only needed for residency-specific accounts.

name: whisper-mcp
notes: Community Whisper MCP server for local transcription. It typically depends on local ffmpeg plus whisper.cpp, so there are no required API-key env vars to preload here.

name: tts-mcp
notes: Community generic TTS MCP server backed by OpenAI text-to-speech models. The package README documents both OPENAI_API_KEY and direct server flags such as --voice and --model.

name: image-generation-mcp
notes: Category-level image generation entry using a multi-provider MCP server. The README requires at least one provider key and documents MEDIA_OUTPUT_DIR for where generated assets are saved.

name: video-generation-mcp
notes: Category-level video generation entry using the same multimodal MCP server. OpenAI and Gemini are the relevant documented providers here, with MEDIA_OUTPUT_DIR controlling local output placement.

name: unity-mcp-server
notes: Community Unity MCP server with a Unity Editor bridge package. The documented npx entry works directly, --no-telemetry disables telemetry, and UNITY_MCP_SKIP_NATIVE_BUILD is an optional troubleshooting switch when native preload fails.

name: ue-mcp
notes: Community Unreal Engine MCP server. In practice you usually run `npx ue-mcp init` once inside the Unreal project to deploy the bridge plugin before using the stdio server.

name: obs-mcp
notes: Community OBS Studio MCP server. It talks to OBS through the built-in WebSocket interface, so OBS Studio must be running locally with WebSocket enabled.

name: mcp-ffmpeg
notes: Community FFmpeg MCP server. It does not document required env vars, but it does require a working ffmpeg binary on PATH before the server can process media.

name: zoom-mcp-server
notes: Community Zoom MCP server. The README expects a Zoom Server-to-Server OAuth app with Meeting scopes, then passes the Account ID, Client ID, and Client Secret through env.

name: google-meet-mcp
notes: Community Google Meet MCP server. The published package's stdio entry reads GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID, GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET, and GOOGLE_REFRESH_TOKEN directly from env, then creates and manages Meet-backed Calendar events.

name: google-calendar-mcp
notes: Community Google Calendar MCP server with fuller documentation than the simpler alternatives. For npx usage the README explicitly requires GOOGLE_OAUTH_CREDENTIALS, while GOOGLE_CALENDAR_MCP_TOKEN_PATH and ENABLED_TOOLS are optional operational controls.
